title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
